---
title: "Visualisation of covidMRP data and results - model 5"
author: "Swen Kuh"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: pdf_document
---
Visualising raw data proportion of outcome and MRP estimate for the small areas: 

```{r setup, echo=F, warning=F, message=F}
## Visualising raw covidMRP data
library(here)
library(ggplot2)
library(tidyverse)
library(HDInterval)
```

```{r,  echo=F, warning=F, message=F}
# data 
source(here("code/data_list.R"))
data_list$strata = as.factor(data_list$strata)

# model 5 results 
m5_postpred <- readRDS(here("results/model files/m5_postpred.RDS"))

# making small area MRP estimates 
p_pop_post_m5 = m5_postpred$draws("p_pop", format="matrix") # stan output
n_sim = nrow(p_pop_post_m5)
n_postcode = data_list$n_postcode
N_pop1 = data_list$N_pop1
n_strata = data_list$n_strata
n_seifa = data_list$n_seifa
n_age = data_list$n_age 
```

```{r plotting postcode, echo=F, warning=F, message=F}
a_postcode = m5_postpred$summary("a_postcode")[,c('variable','median')] |> 
  cbind(postcode = levels(data_list$postcode))

ypred_fit5_postcode <- array(NA, c(n_sim, n_postcode))
for(s in 1:n_sim){
  for(j in 1:n_postcode){  
    ok <- data_list$postcode_pop==j
    ypred_fit5_postcode[s,j] <- sum(N_pop1[ok]*p_pop_post_m5[s,ok])/sum(N_pop1[ok])
  }
}
colnames(ypred_fit5_postcode) =  levels(data_list$postcode) # naming so we can use it in mcmc_intervals()

# HDI and CI of MRP SAEs
MRP_postcode <- as.data.frame(matrix(NA, nrow=n_postcode, ncol=10))
colnames(MRP_postcode) <- c("MRP Estimate","95%HDI_LL","95%HDI_UL","90%HDI_LL",
                            "90%HDI_UL","95%CI_LL","95%CI_UL","90%CI_LL","90%CI_UL", "postcode")
MRP_postcode[,'postcode'] <- levels(data_list$postcode)
for (j in 1:n_postcode){
  MRP_postcode[j,1] <- median(ypred_fit5_postcode[,j])
  MRP_postcode[j,2] <- hdi(ypred_fit5_postcode[,j], credMass=0.95)[1]
  MRP_postcode[j,3] <- hdi(ypred_fit5_postcode[,j], credMass=0.95)[2]
  MRP_postcode[j,4] <- hdi(ypred_fit5_postcode[,j], credMass=0.90)[1]
  MRP_postcode[j,5] <- hdi(ypred_fit5_postcode[,j], credMass=0.90)[2]
  MRP_postcode[j,6] <- quantile(ypred_fit5_postcode[,j], probs=0.025)
  MRP_postcode[j,7] <- quantile(ypred_fit5_postcode[,j], probs=0.975)
  MRP_postcode[j,8] <- quantile(ypred_fit5_postcode[,j], probs=0.05)
  MRP_postcode[j,9] <- quantile(ypred_fit5_postcode[,j], probs=0.95)
}
res_postcode = left_join(a_postcode, MRP_postcode, by='postcode')

tab_pcode = tab |> 
    group_by(postcode) |> 
    summarise(sum_y = sum(positive),
              n = sum(total),
              prop_y = sum_y/n, 
              strata = strata, 
              seifa = seifa)

col_palatte = hcl.colors(5, palette="zissou1")

# proportion of outcome - postcode (n_j > 1) ####
( g1 =  tab_pcode |>
    filter(sum_y > 0) |> 
    arrange(desc(prop_y)) |> 
    left_join(MRP_postcode, by="postcode") |> 
    ggplot(aes(x= fct_reorder(postcode, desc(prop_y)), colour = factor(strata))) + # arranging by prob of outcome
    geom_point(aes(y=prop_y)) + 
    scale_color_manual(values=col_palatte) +
    geom_errorbar(aes(ymin=`90%CI_LL`, ymax=`90%CI_UL`), width=.4, col="#CC6677", alpha=0.3) +
    geom_point(aes(y=`MRP Estimate`),col="#CC6677") +
    labs(x="postcode", y="proportion of outcome", title = "sum(y) > 0, arranged by prop_y, colored by strata") +
    theme_bw() +
    theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90, vjust = 0.2, size=6)) )

( g1s =  tab_pcode |>
    filter(sum_y > 0) |> 
    arrange(desc(prop_y)) |> 
    left_join(MRP_postcode, by="postcode") |> 
    ggplot(aes(x= fct_reorder(postcode, desc(prop_y)), colour = factor(seifa))) + # arranging by prob of outcome
    geom_point(aes(y=prop_y)) + 
    scale_color_manual(values=col_palatte) +
    geom_errorbar(aes(ymin=`90%CI_LL`, ymax=`90%CI_UL`), width=.4, col="#CC6677", alpha=0.3) +
    geom_point(aes(y=`MRP Estimate`),col="#CC6677") +
    labs(x="postcode", y="proportion of outcome", title = "sum(y) > 0, arranged by prop_y, colored by seifa") +
    theme_bw() +
    theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90, vjust = 0.2, size=6)) )

( g2 = tab_pcode |>
    filter(sum_y > 0) |> 
    left_join(res_postcode, by="postcode") |> 
    ggplot(aes(x=fct_reorder(postcode, desc(n)), colour = factor(strata))) +
    geom_point(aes(y=prop_y)) + 
    geom_errorbar(aes(ymin=`90%CI_LL`, ymax=`90%CI_UL`), width=.4, col="#CC6677", alpha=0.3) +
    geom_point(aes(y=`MRP Estimate`),col="#CC6677") +
    scale_color_manual(values=col_palatte) +
    labs(x="postcode", y="proportion of outcome", title = "sum(y) > 0, arranged by sum(n_j)") +
    theme_bw() +
    theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90, vjust = 0.2, size=6))  )

# proportion of outcome - postcode (n_j = 1)
( g3 = tab_pcode |>
    filter(sum_y == 0) |> 
    left_join(res_postcode, by="postcode") |> 
    ggplot(aes(x=fct_reorder(postcode, desc(`MRP Estimate`)), colour = factor(strata))) +
    geom_point(aes(y=prop_y)) + 
    geom_errorbar(aes(ymin=`90%CI_LL`, ymax=`90%CI_UL`), width=.4, col="#CC6677", alpha=0.3) +
    geom_point(aes(y=`MRP Estimate`),col="#CC6677") +
    scale_color_manual(values=col_palatte) +
    labs(x="postcode", y="proportion of outcome") +
    theme_bw() +
    ylim(0, 0.06) +
    theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90, vjust = 0.2, size=6))  + 
    labs(title = "sum(y) == 0") )

# strata ------------------------------------------------------------------
a_strata = m5_postpred$summary("a_strata")[,c('variable','median')] |> 
  cbind(strata = levels(data_list$strata))

ypred_fit5_strata <- array(NA, c(n_sim, n_strata))
for(s in 1:n_sim){
  for(j in 1:n_strata){  
    ok <- data_list$strata_pop==j
    ypred_fit5_strata[s,j] <- sum(N_pop1[ok]*p_pop_post_m5[s,ok])/sum(N_pop1[ok])
  }
}
colnames(ypred_fit5_strata) =  levels(data_list$strata) # naming so we can use it in mcmc_intervals()

# HDI and CI of MRP SAEs
MRP_strata <- as.data.frame(matrix(NA, nrow=n_strata, ncol=10))
colnames(MRP_strata) <- c("MRP Estimate","95%HDI_LL","95%HDI_UL","90%HDI_LL",
                          "90%HDI_UL","95%CI_LL","95%CI_UL","90%CI_LL","90%CI_UL", "strata")
MRP_strata[,'strata'] <- levels(data_list$strata)
for (j in 1:n_strata){
  MRP_strata[j,1] <- median(ypred_fit5_strata[,j])
  MRP_strata[j,2] <- hdi(ypred_fit5_strata[,j], credMass=0.95)[1]
  MRP_strata[j,3] <- hdi(ypred_fit5_strata[,j], credMass=0.95)[2]
  MRP_strata[j,4] <- hdi(ypred_fit5_strata[,j], credMass=0.90)[1]
  MRP_strata[j,5] <- hdi(ypred_fit5_strata[,j], credMass=0.90)[2]
  MRP_strata[j,6] <- quantile(ypred_fit5_strata[,j], probs=0.025)
  MRP_strata[j,7] <- quantile(ypred_fit5_strata[,j], probs=0.975)
  MRP_strata[j,8] <- quantile(ypred_fit5_strata[,j], probs=0.05)
  MRP_strata[j,9] <- quantile(ypred_fit5_strata[,j], probs=0.95)
}
res_strata = left_join(a_strata, MRP_strata, by='strata')

# proportion of outcome - strata (n_y == 1 )
( g_strata = tab |> 
    group_by(strata) |> 
    summarise(sum_y = sum(positive),
              n = sum(total),
              prop_y = sum_y/n) |>
    left_join(res_strata, by="strata") |> 
    ggplot(aes(x=strata)) +
    geom_point(aes(y=prop_y), col="#88CCEE") + 
    geom_errorbar(aes(ymin=`90%CI_LL`, ymax=`90%CI_UL`), width=.4, col="#CC6677", alpha=0.3) +
    geom_point(aes(y=`MRP Estimate`),col="#CC6677") +
    labs(x="strata", y="proportion of outcome") +
    theme_bw() +
    theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90, vjust = 0.2, size=6))  )

# seifa ------------------------------------------------------------------
a_seifa = m5_postpred$summary("a_seifa")[,c('variable','median')] |> 
  cbind(seifa = levels(data_list$seifa))


ypred_fit5_seifa <- array(NA, c(n_sim, n_seifa))
for(s in 1:n_sim){
  for(j in 1:n_seifa){  
    ok <- data_list$seifa_pop==j
    ypred_fit5_seifa[s,j] <- sum(N_pop1[ok]*p_pop_post_m5[s,ok])/sum(N_pop1[ok])
  }
}
colnames(ypred_fit5_seifa) =  levels(data_list$seifa) # naming so we can use it in mcmc_intervals()

# HDI and CI of MRP SAEs
MRP_seifa <- as.data.frame(matrix(NA, nrow=n_seifa, ncol=10))
colnames(MRP_seifa) <- c("MRP Estimate","95%HDI_LL","95%HDI_UL","90%HDI_LL",
                         "90%HDI_UL","95%CI_LL","95%CI_UL","90%CI_LL","90%CI_UL", "seifa")
MRP_seifa[,'seifa'] <- levels(data_list$seifa)
for (j in 1:n_seifa){
  MRP_seifa[j,1] <- median(ypred_fit5_seifa[,j])
  MRP_seifa[j,2] <- hdi(ypred_fit5_seifa[,j], credMass=0.95)[1]
  MRP_seifa[j,3] <- hdi(ypred_fit5_seifa[,j], credMass=0.95)[2]
  MRP_seifa[j,4] <- hdi(ypred_fit5_seifa[,j], credMass=0.90)[1]
  MRP_seifa[j,5] <- hdi(ypred_fit5_seifa[,j], credMass=0.90)[2]
  MRP_seifa[j,6] <- quantile(ypred_fit5_seifa[,j], probs=0.025)
  MRP_seifa[j,7] <- quantile(ypred_fit5_seifa[,j], probs=0.975)
  MRP_seifa[j,8] <- quantile(ypred_fit5_seifa[,j], probs=0.05)
  MRP_seifa[j,9] <- quantile(ypred_fit5_seifa[,j], probs=0.95)
}
res_seifa = left_join(a_seifa, MRP_seifa, by='seifa')

# proportion of outcome - seifa 
(g_seifa = tab |> 
    group_by(seifa) |> 
    summarise(sum_y = sum(positive),
              n = sum(total),
              prop_y = sum_y/n) |>
    left_join(res_seifa, by="seifa") |> 
    ggplot(aes(x=seifa)) +
    geom_point(aes(y=prop_y), col="#88CCEE") + 
    geom_errorbar(aes(ymin=`90%CI_LL`, ymax=`90%CI_UL`), width=.4, col="#CC6677", alpha=0.3) +
    geom_point(aes(y=`MRP Estimate`),col="#CC6677") +
    labs(x="seifa", y="proportion of outcome") +
    theme_bw() +
    theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90, vjust = 0.2, size=6)))

# age ------------------------------------------------------------------
a_age = m5_postpred$summary("a_age")[,c('variable','median')] |> 
  cbind(agegp = levels(data_list$agegp))

ypred_fit5_age <- array(NA, c(n_sim, n_age))
for(s in 1:n_sim){
  for(j in 1:n_age){  
    ok <- data_list$agegp_pop==j
    ypred_fit5_age[s,j] <- sum(N_pop1[ok]*p_pop_post_m5[s,ok])/sum(N_pop1[ok])
  }
}
colnames(ypred_fit5_age) =  levels(data_list$agegp) # naming so we can use it in mcmc_intervals()

# HDI and CI of MRP SAEs
MRP_age <- as.data.frame(matrix(NA, nrow=n_age, ncol=10))
colnames(MRP_age) <- c("MRP Estimate","95%HDI_LL","95%HDI_UL","90%HDI_LL",
                       "90%HDI_UL","95%CI_LL","95%CI_UL","90%CI_LL","90%CI_UL", "agegp")
MRP_age[,'agegp'] <- levels(data_list$agegp)
for (j in 1:n_age){
  MRP_age[j,1] <- median(ypred_fit5_age[,j])
  MRP_age[j,2] <- hdi(ypred_fit5_age[,j], credMass=0.95)[1]
  MRP_age[j,3] <- hdi(ypred_fit5_age[,j], credMass=0.95)[2]
  MRP_age[j,4] <- hdi(ypred_fit5_age[,j], credMass=0.90)[1]
  MRP_age[j,5] <- hdi(ypred_fit5_age[,j], credMass=0.90)[2]
  MRP_age[j,6] <- quantile(ypred_fit5_age[,j], probs=0.025)
  MRP_age[j,7] <- quantile(ypred_fit5_age[,j], probs=0.975)
  MRP_age[j,8] <- quantile(ypred_fit5_age[,j], probs=0.05)
  MRP_age[j,9] <- quantile(ypred_fit5_age[,j], probs=0.95)
}
res_age = left_join(a_age, MRP_age, by='agegp')

# proportion of outcome - age 
(g_age = tab |> 
    group_by(agegp) |> 
    summarise(sum_y = sum(positive),
              n = sum(total),
              prop_y = sum_y/n) |>
    left_join(res_age, by="agegp") |> 
    ggplot(aes(x=agegp)) +
    geom_point(aes(y=prop_y), col="#88CCEE") + 
    geom_errorbar(aes(ymin=`90%CI_LL`, ymax=`90%CI_UL`), width=.4, col="#CC6677", alpha=0.3) +
    geom_point(aes(y=`MRP Estimate`),col="#CC6677") +
    labs(x="age", y="proportion of outcome") +
    theme_bw() +
    theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90, vjust = 0.2, size=6)) )
```

```{r calculating residuals, echo=F}
# extracting posterior median of alpha's
a_strat_med = as.numeric(as.matrix(m5_postpred$summary(c("a_strata"))[,'median']))
a_age_med = as.numeric(as.matrix(m5_postpred$summary(c("a_age"))[,'median']))
a_seifa_med = as.numeric(as.matrix(m5_postpred$summary(c("a_seifa"))[,'median']))
a_postcode_med = as.numeric(as.matrix(m5_postpred$summary(c("a_postcode"))[,'median']))

# beta's 
beta =  as.numeric(as.matrix(m5_postpred$summary('b')[,'median']))

# summing up
tab$seifa_cont = as.numeric(tab$seifa)
tab$sum_reg = with(tab, a_strat_med[strata] + a_age_med[agegp] + a_seifa_med[seifa] + beta[1] + beta[2]*sex + beta[3]*seifa_cont)

tab$inv_logit_sum_reg = brms::inv_logit_scaled(tab$sum_reg)

## postcode with 'residuals'
( g_res = tab |> 
    group_by(postcode) |> 
    summarise(sum_y = sum(positive),
              n = sum(total),
              prop_y = sum_y/n, 
              inv_logit_sum_reg = mean(inv_logit_sum_reg)) |>
    mutate(pseudo_residuals = prop_y - inv_logit_sum_reg) |> 
    filter(sum_y > 0) |>
    arrange(prop_y) |> 
    left_join(res_postcode, by="postcode") |> 
    mutate(postcode = fct_reorder(postcode, desc(prop_y))) |> # arranging by estimate
    ggplot(aes(x=postcode)) +
     geom_point(aes(y=pseudo_residuals), col="green") + 
    geom_point(aes(y=prop_y), col="#88CCEE") + 
    geom_errorbar(aes(ymin=`90%CI_LL`, ymax=`90%CI_UL`), width=.4, col="#CC6677", alpha=0.3) +
    geom_point(aes(y=`MRP Estimate`),col="#CC6677") +
    labs(x="postcode", y="proportion of outcome", title = "sum(y) > 0, arranged by prop_y. With 'residuals'") +
    theme_bw() +
    theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90, vjust = 0.2, size=6)) )
```
